species.distribution: Hong Kong, Japan, Moluccas, ?Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. species.citation: (Blanco) Merr. , Sp. Blancoanae (1918) 50; ≡ Myriotheca arborescens Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 831. = Angiopteris leytensis Alderw. , Bull. Jard. Bot. Buitenzorg, 2nd Sér. 28 (1918) 4. = Angiopteris caudata de Vriese , Monogr. Marattiac. (1853) 20 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 24.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. LEYTE, LUZON: Batangas, Ifugao, Zambales, MINDORO, PALAWAN.

species.citation: Christ , Bull. Herb. Boissier, 1st Sér. 6 (1898) 207 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 24.
species.distribution: China, Philippines. LUZON: Benguet, Laguna, Mountain Province, NEGROS.

species.citation: (G.Forst.) Hoffm. , Commentat. Soc. Regiae Sci. Gott. 12 (1794) 29 ; Sw., Syn. Fil. (1806) 395; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 22, in obs., pro syn. A. palmiformis; Coritico & Amoroso, Nature Conservation Research 5 (2020) 81; Galope-Obemio et al., J. Threatened Taxa 14 (2022) 22046; Rufila et al., Ruhuna J. Science 13 (2022) 158; Bada et al., J. Tropical Biol. & Conservation 20 (2023) 115; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 665; De Villa & Lagat, PJS 153 (2024) 1823; ≡ Polypodium evectum G.Forst. , Fl. Ins. Austr. (1786) 81. = Angiopteris palmiformis (Cav.) C.Chr. , Dansk Bot. Ark. 9 (1937) 30 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 22; ≡ Clementea palmiformis Cav. , Descr. Pl. (Cavanilles) (1802) 554. = Angiopteris uncinata Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 186, nom. illeg., non de Vriese ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 24. = ?Angiopteris angustifolia var. prunifera Hieron. , Hedwigia 61 (1919) 257 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 25.
species.distribution: BATAN, BOHOL, DINAGAT (photos), LUBANG, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Aurora, Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Cavite, Ifugao, Isabela, Kalinga, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental, South Cotabato, Surigao del Norte, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: Kunze , Bot. Zeitung (Berlin) 4 (1846) 417. ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 25. = Angiopteris hypoleuca de Vriese , Ned. Kruidk. Arch. 2(2) (1851) 286.
species.distribution: Bismarck Arch, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Sumatra. BILIRAN, BOHOL, LEYTE, LUZON: Benguet, Cavite, Laguna, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, SAMAR.

species.citation: Racib. , Bull. Int. Acad. Sci. Cracovie 1902 (1902) 54. = Macroglossum alidae Copel. , PJS 3c (1909) 342.
Rosenst. , Meded. Rijks-Herb. 31 (1917) 3. = Angiopteris elmeriana Copel. , LPB 5 (1913) 1679 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 23.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Cotabato, Davao del Sur.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 16 May 2025

species.citation: (Blume) Maxon , Proc. Biol. Soc. Washington 18 (1905) 240 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 27; Coritico & Amoroso, Nature Conservation Research 5 (2020) 82; ≡ Kaulfussia aesculifolia (Blume) Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 260; ≡ Aspidium aesculifolium Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 143; Type: Blume? (L51148). = Christensenia aesculifolia subsp. korthalsii (de Vriese) Rolleri , Amer. Fern J. 83 (1993) 16.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, China, India, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. LEYTE, LUZON: Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Isabela (photos), Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Agusan del Sur, Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao de Oro, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, South Cotabato, Surigao, Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: (de Vriese) Rolleri , Amer. Fern J. 83 (1993) 17; ≡ Kaulfussia lobbiana de Vriese & Harting , Monogr. Marattiac. (1853) 14; Type: from Java. = Christensenia cumingiana Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 186; Type: Copeland, s.n. (?MICH, holo; ?PNH, iso).
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Philippines, Sumatra, Thailand. LEYTE, LUZON: Batangas, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan, Bukidnon (photos), Davao del Sur, South Cotabato, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: (C.Presl) Murdock , Taxon 57 (2008) 747 ; Galope-Obemio et al., J. Threatened Taxa 14 (2022) 22046; ≡ Marattia pellucida C.Presl , Suppl. Tent. Pterid. (1845) 10 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 26; Type: Cuming 177 (L, ?holo; BM, P, US), Luzon: Camarines. = Marattia haenkeana C.Presl , Suppl. Tent. Pterid. (1845) 11; Type: Haenke s.n. (PR or PRC, holo), Luzon. = Marattia vestita Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 185; Type: Copeland 1179 (MICH, holo; US, iso). Mindanao; Davao District, Mt Apo, Apr-1904.
species.distribution: Philippines, Sulawesi, Taiwan, Vietnam. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Albay, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Benguet, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Mountain Province, Quezon, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, South Cotabato, MINDORO, NEGROS, SAMAR.
species.notes: C Luzon southwards to Mindanao: Mt Matutum.

species.citation: (Blume) Murdock , Taxon 57 (2008) 747; ≡ Marattia sambucina Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 256.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, NEGROS.

species.citation: (Blume) Murdock , Taxon 57 (2008) 747 ; Bada et al., J. Tropical Biol. & Conservation 20 (2023) 115; Pescuela et al., PJS 153 (2024) 665; ≡ Marattia sylvatica Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 256 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 27.
species.distribution: Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra. CAMIGUIN, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES, LUZON: Benguet, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato (photos), Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Oriental, South Cotabato, NEGROS, PALAWAN.
species.notes: Common in mossy montane forests to c. 2400m. In Luzon in the Central Cordillera.

species.citation: (de Vriese) Murdock , Taxon 57 (2008) 747; ≡ Marattia ternatea Christ , PJS 2c (1907) 185 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 26; Type: from Moluccas.
species.distribution: Bismarck Arch, Moluccas, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, ?Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi. ?LUZON.
